zh.Howdenshire, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾豪登史爾
zh.Howden, Yorks, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾豪登
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Aske於大約1333年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Richard Aske32歲，母親Joan of Yorkshire25歲。他與Joan Shelvestrode結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1370年在英國英格蘭越可爾豪登史爾被列為senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard)。他去世於1395年在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.Howdenshire, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾豪登史爾
zh-hans.Howden, Yorks, England: 英国英格兰越可爾豪登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Aske于大约1333年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Richard Aske32岁，母亲Joan of Yorkshire25岁。他与Joan Shelvestrode结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1370年在英国英格兰越可爾豪登史爾被列为senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard)。他去世于1395年在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Staffordshire): topographic name from northern Middle English ask ‘ash tree’ (Old Norse askr), or a habitational name from Aske (North Yorkshire). Compare Ash .

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Axe
meanings: English (West Yorkshire, Lincolnshire): variant of Aske with metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled with an x.

English (Dorset, Somerset): habitational name from Axe Farm in Chardstock (Devon, formerly in Dorset), itself named for the river Axe, which forms part of the south-eastern boundary of Chardstock parish.
Americanized form of German   Axt   or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Aske was born about 1333, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Aske, was 32 and his mother, Joan of Yorkshire, was 25. He married Joan Shelvestrode. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1370, his occupation is listed as senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) in Howdenshire, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1395, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Aske est né environ 1333, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Aske, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan of Yorkshire, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Shelvestrode. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1370, sa profession de son indiquée est senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) à Howdenshire, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1395, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Aske um 1333 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Aske 32 und seine Mutter Joan of Yorkshire 25. Er hat Joan Shelvestrode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1370 ist sein Beruf als senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) in Howdenshire, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1395 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Aske è nato il circa 1333 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Aske, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan of Yorkshire, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Shelvestrode. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1370, la sua occupazione è indicata come senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) nel Howdenshire, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1395, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Howden, Yorks, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホーウデン
ja.Aughton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアアウトン
ja.Howden, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアホーウデン
ja.lifeSummary: John de Askeが約1333年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Askeは32歳，母Joan of Yorkshireは25歳であった。Joan Shelvestrodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1370年，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホーウデンシュアイアでの職業はsenechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard)と記録されている。彼は1395年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Aske(이)가 대략 1333년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Aske(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan of Yorkshire(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Joan Shelvestrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1370년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하우덴실르에서 senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard)이었다. 그는 1395년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Howden, Yorks, England: Howden, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Aske nasceu aproximadamente 1333, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Aske, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan of Yorkshire, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Shelvestrode. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1370, sua profissão aparece como senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) em Howdenshire, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1395, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Aske родился около 1333 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Aske было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan of Yorkshire, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Shelvestrode. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1370 году он работал по профессии senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) в местности хоуденшир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1395 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Aske nació aproximadamente 1333, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Aske, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan of Yorkshire, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Shelvestrode. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1370, su ocupación registrada era senechal of howdenshire (suceeded richard) en Howdenshire, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1395, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
